name: Xsolla
description: Game commerce suite with mobile SDK, web shop, global payments, subscriptions and in-game purchase infrastructure for developers.

seo.title: Xsolla — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Xsolla: Game commerce suite with mobile SDK, web shop, global payments, subscriptions and in-game purchase infrastructure for developers.

when_to_use: Web shop for games selling outside Apple/Google stores
Global payment acceptance with mobile SDK for game developers
Subscription and in-game purchase infrastructure for studios

pros: Mobile SDK, web shop, subscriptions included
Global payment methods covered for gaming
cons: Revenue share model can sting at scale
review.verdict: Turnkey monetization for game studios — convenience is real, but the rev share hits hard at serious scale.
review.best_for: Game developers and studios selling digital goods globally wanting merchant-of-record coverage
review.not_for: Non-gaming businesses or large studios where rev share economics hurt
